transcript: You've already called before. You called two weeks ago and jerked me around on the same thing with some eel bowel stuff. I don't know who ya are, I don't know what your plan is, but you keep strokin' me. I don't know what... Ain't you got nothing better to do?
What do you do, smoke crack for a livin'?
Just leave me a number where I can call you back on your mule.
Okay, good. I'll call you right back.
I just called. That's a doctor's number. Quit fuckin' with me. Do you understand English?
Oh, you're going to get physical, huh? Because we don't have mule bowels?
I wish you'd quit wasting my time. I've got a thousand things to do today.
